87.reason: [Error: When p2 is NULL, accessing z->link causes a segmentation fault. The function does not handle the case where the list is empty.]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Error: When p2 is NULL, accessing z->link causes a segmentation fault. The function does not handle the case where the list is empty.]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.25 , reason:  如果链表只有一个节点且p2->s < q2，则循环不执行，直接返回p2，这是正确的；但如果p2->s > q2，返回NULL，但insertWord处理NULL分支逻辑错误

89.reason: [Error: When p2 is NULL, accessing p2->s causes a segmentation fault. The function does not check if p2 is NULL before dereferencing.]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Error: When p2 is NULL, accessing p2->s causes a segmentation fault. The function does not check if p2 is NULL before dereferencing.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.14285714285714285 , reason:  Incorrectly compares the head node 'p2' instead of the current node or its predecessor, leading to wrong insertion points for words that should be placed at the beginning.

39.reason: [没有检查str是否为空，导致连续非字母时创建空单词节点]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.25 , reason:  当str为空（连续非字母）时，仍创建空单词节点，应添加条件 if(str[0]!='\0') 才执行处理
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [没有检查str是否为空，导致连续非字母时创建空单词节点]
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.14285714285714285 , reason:  Creates a node even when 'str' is empty (e.g., consecutive delimiters), leading to unnecessary memory allocation and potential logical clutter.

58.reason: 在C89标准中，不能在for循环内声明变量，应提前声明PWord ptr

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.25 , reason:  在C89标准中，不能在for循环内声明变量，应提前声明PWord ptr
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.2 , reason:  In C89/C90 standard, declaring a variable inside the for-loop initialization is not allowed. Declare 'ptr' before the loop to avoid compilation error.

49.reason: The logic to find the insertion position is flawed. It incorrectly compares the head node 'p2' inside the loop and fails to correctly determine where 'str' should be inserted lexicographically.

50.reason: When 'location' is NULL (indicating insertion at the head), 'insertWord' incorrectly inserts 'q' after 'start' instead of making 'q' the new head of the list.

101.reason: Logical error: When inserting at the head (here==NULL), p4->link should point to p3, not p3->link.

reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.14285714285714285 , reason:  For head insertion (here==NULL), this incorrectly links p4 after p3. It should set p4->link=p3 and return p4 to update the list head.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.2 , reason:  Logical error: When inserting at the head (here==NULL), p4->link should point to p3, not p3->link.

38.reason: In C89/C90 standard, variable declarations must be placed at the beginning of a block before any executable statements. This causes a compilation error in strict C89 mode.

reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.2 , reason:  In C89/C90 standard, variable declarations must be placed at the beginning of a block before any executable statements. This causes a compilation error in strict C89 mode.

102.reason: Logical error: This inserts the new node after the head instead of before it.
